title: vitex peduncularis f. roxburghiana
intro: Vitex peduncularis f. roxburghiana, also known as Chinese chaste tree, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vitex peduncularis f. roxburghiana include relief from menstrual cramps, improved fertility, and reduced stress levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support reproductive health and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
